SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is made and entered into on this 15th day of October 2023 by and among the following parties:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: tanweiming@example.sg.

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789C), residing at 456 Clementi Ave, Singapore 123456, reachable at +65 9876 5432, email: siti.abdullah@example.sg.

3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC: S4567890D), residing at 789 Toa Payoh Lorong, Singapore 310123, reachable at +65 9988 7766, email: ramasamy.m@example.sg.

Company: Tech Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: 202312345A), located at 789 Raffles Place, Singapore 048616.

The SPA will govern the terms and conditions under which the parties agree to operate and manage the Company. The purchase price for the shares is set at SGD 500,000.

Please note that this SHA does not include any project plan or project status updates.

For more information, visit https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.
